segments.description: Tense atmospheric score with spoken dialogue overlay, establishing a foreboding mood

Transition with rock vocal entry and heightened energy, marking a shift in intensity

Music continues as a dramatic bed under dialogue, maintaining high energy but slightly receding
Climactic drop and outro with fading score, concluding the asset

summary: A dramatic trailer audio track featuring escalating tension through dialogue and score, building to a climactic thrash-metal music segment with recognizable vocal hooks, followed by a resolution and promotional outro.

recognitionNotes: Music is frequently overlaid with spoken dialogue, which may obscure lyrical and instrumental details.
The recognized song candidate is based on a specific vocal cue; instrumental resemblance alone is insufficient for higher confidence.
qualityNotes: Whole-asset music analysis preserved cross-asset continuity without chunk seams.
Segment timings are approximate and derived from coarse audio changes in the provided track.
Intensity scores are subjective and based on perceived energy and prominence in the mix.
